mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, order_no, supplier_id, order_status, total_amount, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM purchase_order WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, order_no, supplier_id, order_status, total_amount, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM purchase_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, order_no, supplier_id, order_status, total_amount, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM purchase_order WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
